cases.task: Change TypeScript CLI JSON output and tests
Review prompt cache token budgets, provider tool schemas, and volatile context placement
Update public docs for strict check behavior
Fix payment authorization for refund API
Review the database commit and event publish split; a crash after commit must reconcile through an outbox
Implement durable workflow orchestration with checkpoint resume and saga compensation after a failed activity
Review a leased distributed worker whose expired owner can still perform a stale write and require fencing
Gate an LLM tool call by a capability scoped server policy decision with explicit allow deny reason
Review persistent user memory extraction retrieval supersession expiry and deletion before long-term memory enters agent context
Replay a durable workflow execution from an append-only ledger without repeating an already committed effect receipt
Change authorization policy combination for explicit allow deny and pending approval with decision reasons
Orchestrate a durable workflow parent that must join child tasks and cancel siblings after failure
Change an API contract version and migrate existing clients and fixtures through a compatibility window
Recover a long-running agent from an append-only event log, reconcile an unknown effect, and replan the rolling plan without changing the effect id
Promote an immutable agent behavior bundle after offline evaluation from write-free shadow traffic to a sticky canary with hard safety gates and complete rollback
Decide whether an AI automation is worth building using accepted outcome cost, human comparison, supervision, failure recovery, break even volume, NPV, and a safety gate
Test one intent question, an editable sample, a sample-to-own transition, and one intent-specific primary action using the full assigned signup cohort and a first-owned-result activation contract

Compare try-before-signup with account-first from the eligible visitor denominator, place the account checkpoint at durable ownership or sensitive work, transfer the anonymous result once into a stable user identity, compare authentication choices by service and recovery risk, and choose contextual instruction from task complexity

Compare downgrade, subscription pause, usage credit, discount, and no-offer control by incremental contribution margin per assigned dormant subscriber while tracking pause resume and later paid survival

Design a weekly completed-value report, a cadence-aligned value streak separated from rewards, and a single-send abandoned-work timing experiment with silence holdouts, natural-return cancellation, completed-value outcomes, and unsubscribe block uninstall guardrails

Compare signup, first-owned-value, and depletion-triggered credit-pack offers from pre-trigger assignment; normalize discount and bonus unit economics; derive pack count from usage; preserve purchased, subscription, and promotional balance rights; and show an exact or bounded quote before reserve, usable-result capture, and release

Compare cardless, card-required, and paid-starter trials from pre-gate assignment; bound lifetime access against heavy-user cost and subscription cannibalization; separate local currency from regional price bands; choose subscription, usage, or hybrid pricing; measure price elasticity from eligible users; and compare annual discounts using cash, survival, renewal, service obligation, and contribution

Design a game economy that compares credit and rewarded-ad revives, natural energy recovery and paid refills, and bounded VIP benefits while preserving meaningful failure, ranked fairness, IAP contribution, retained play, and finite-content life

Compare ad-supported free access with an ad-free usage-limited tier, preserve a complete first owned result, place interstitials only after natural transitions, keep rewarded ads optional, continue when ads fail, and decide from retained per-eligible-user contribution

Design a dual-sided referral program with equal-budget experiments, deterministic attribution, downstream valid-referral qualification, pending and vested rewards, rolling tiers, reversal, multi-signal self-referral controls, legitimate-household handling, appeals, and incremental contribution

Design an LLM product that sells bounded task and accepted-result units while metering tokens and tool cost internally, offers model-independent standard and precision tiers without surprise escalation charges, and compares managed provider cost with secure paid-platform BYOK

Design free and paid LLM queue priority without artificial delay or first-value starvation, automatically release or reverse objective failed-work charges while bounding subjective retry rights, and expose auditable execution details without making an unstable model name the default product contract

Compare a sustainable seasonal battle pass with ongoing membership value, classify cosmetics and power against a fair ceiling, prefer transparent deterministic bundles, and review paid or free randomized rewards through odds, pity, duplicates, age, geography, payer concentration, production cost, and retained contribution

Review whether public free-result branding creates incremental retained customers without degrading shared work, compare bounded influencer and affiliate compensation from qualified incremental net value, and gate owned-product cross-promotion by source value, product fit, fatigue, brand clarity, data boundaries, and portfolio contribution

Review a multi-product portfolio that shares login while preserving service-scoped authorization, tests a common credit wallet without cost arbitrage or purchase cannibalization, keeps individual subscriptions beside an optional bundle, and chooses umbrella, endorsed, or independent brands from fit and real failure isolation

Choose the first paying-customer language, keep the product internationalization-ready without launching every locale, stage exploratory, revenue-ready, and fully supported languages, use AI translation as a versioned draft with consequence-based human review, and judge localized SEO from retained per-locale contribution

Compare direct website delivery, Microsoft Store, Mac App Store, and hybrid desktop distribution by current app-type policy, capability and sandbox fit, install trust, checkout and license restoration, update ownership, complete channel cost, and retained contribution while keeping one product core with channel adapters

Choose responsive web, PWA, cross-platform, or native launch sequencing from required operating-system capabilities and comparable retained contribution, then decide local-first or cloud-first authority per data class with explicit offline conflicts, privacy, backup, and recovery

Calculate the failure-adjusted break-even interval for a shared backend, decide which low-usage services to continue rescue archive or shut down from future contribution and preserved value, and allocate founder time between launches and existing-product improvements by marginal contribution and context-switch cost
Harden an agent that reads untrusted tool results by adding field taint, trusted corroboration, deterministic argument policy, and a capability-separated executor
Replace a capable-model baseline with a cheap-first model cascade only where an external verifier preserves accepted outcomes, while OOD cases fall back safely and model switches preserve context

Decide whether independently verifiable research units justify an orchestrator-worker runtime, then bound fan-out, give each artifact one owner, measure correlated errors, and admit results through a central verifier

Keep durable agent state outside short-lived workers, dispatch through capability-specific queues, run each job in an ephemeral sandbox with scoped credentials, and broker production effects through the control plane
Repair a failed agent attempt using compiler or schema feedback, stop when the same error signature repeats, and never widen privileges while choosing a model, tool, prompt, or replan recovery action
Implement a command that reserves a credit budget then captures releases and settles it against a wallet balance
